title: Velocity Free Ranks
description: 700 Free minecraft Prefixes in 1 recource pack
body:
With this 100% free recource pack u get 700 prefixes,
25 ranks 2 styles and 14 colors!

**Need any help??тАЛ**
dm me,
dc: Seavitas

**Or join the Velocity Nodes discord server where our amazing staff team will help you!:
https://discord.gg/38JPabGe**

**All 700 unicodes are found in the unicode_mapping.txt file but here is a little preview**

**Filename	Unicode Character**
```
admin--bronze	                юАА
admin--bronze_black-border	    юАБ
admin--dark_blue	            юАВ
admin--dark_blue_black-border	юАГ
admin--dark_green	            юАД
admin--dark_green_black-border	юАЕ

admin--gobling_black_border 	юАЗ
admin--light_blue	            юАИ
admin--light_blue_black_border	юАЙ
admin--light_green	            юАК
admin--light_green_black_border	юАЛ

admin--orange_black-border	    юАН
admin--pink	                    юАО
admin--pink_black_border	    юАП

admin--purple_black_border     	юАС
```
